Member.title: Member
Member.description: A member registered in the department roster.

name.description: Full name of the department member.

role.description: Position, title, or role of the member within the shuffle.

photoUrl.description: Unsplash or custom photo URL for the member avatar.

selected.description: Whether the member is currently selected to participate in the draw.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the member was added.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the member was last modified.

members/{memberId}.description: Roster of department members shared across devices in real-time.
